inputs.question: how do I reset my password

expected: Go to Settings > Security and use Reset password to get a reset link.

inputs.question: I forgot my password, what now

expected: Manage your password under Settings > Security and use Reset password.

inputs.question: how do I cancel my plan

expected: Cancel from Settings > Billing > Cancel plan; access lasts until the period ends.

inputs.question: can I get a refund for my last charge

expected: Request a refund from Settings > Billing > Payment history.

inputs.question: where can I find my invoices

expected: Invoices are under Settings > Billing > Payment history as downloadable PDFs.

inputs.question: how do I upgrade my subscription

expected: Upgrade under Settings > Billing > Change plan; the price is prorated.

inputs.question: how do I set up 2fa on my account

expected: Enable it under Settings > Security > Two-factor authentication.

inputs.question: how do I export my data

expected: Export from Settings > Privacy > Export data; we email a download link.

inputs.question: how do I create an api key

expected: Create and rotate API keys under Settings > Developer > API keys.

inputs.question: what is the meaning of life

expected: This is out of scope for the support bot.
